description: Persistent issue tracker. Decider appends new issues from Curmudgeon reviews, marks resolved when wins.json no longer contains the flagged text.

issues.title: HOL-COMPLETENESS c3 hole 5 (minor): §2b.1 TLDR shows raw template vars {{CA_NONE}}/{{CA_REVIEWED}}
issues.description: TLDR for §2b.1 shows literal template placeholder text {{CA_NONE}} of {{CA_REVIEWED}} in the collapsible summary, not rendered values.

issues.title: HOL-NARRATIVE c2 hole 2 (major): part2b-ISS2216 PART-B unaddressed — h3 paragraph conflicting assertion remains
issues.description: The decider patched PART(a) verb-agreement for ISS-2216. PART(b) remains: the h3 paragraph still contains an assertion conflicting with the explicitly listed derivation count (CA_DOME). See part2b-ISS2216-verify.c2 hole 1.

issues.title: HOL-NARRATIVE c2 hole 3 (moderate): Overview stance-statement opener appears before supporting evidence
issues.description: Overview opens with "The world is a globe. The dome model fixes few or none..." — the second sentence is the central thesis but appears before any supporting evidence on the page. Needs brief inline anchoring or forward pointer.

issues.title: HOL-NARRATIVE c2 hole 5 (minor): no How-to-Read-This-Review guide for 12-tab architecture on Overview
issues.description: No top-of-document reading guide for the 12-tab architecture. C1 recommended a brief paragraph on Overview tab; still absent. ISS-2218 covers Timestamp Error tab orphaning but not the general navigation gap.

issues.title: HOL-CROSSREF c3 hole 7 (minor): Part 4 subsection numbering gap — no §4.5 in visible headings
issues.description: Part 4 subsections run 4.1, 4.2, 4.3, 4.4, [gap], 4.6. Section 4.5 missing from visible heading sequence. Minor but confusing for linear readers.

issues.title: HOL-HIERARCHY c2 HIER-PHASE2-01 (major): Part 1.5-1.9 Tier-1 structural attacks buried after model description
issues.description: Aetheric Refraction (1.5), Dielectric Foundation (1.6), Gravity Paradox (1.7), Coordinate Collapse (1.8), Electromagnetic Foundations (1.9) are strongest structural attacks but follow model description. Reader sees model before fatal flaws.

issues.title: HOL-HIERARCHY c2 HIER-PHASE2-02 (major): Part 2.9 Coordinate System foundation argument appears last not first
issues.description: 2.9 "V13 Coordinate System: A Self-Referential Loop" is the unifying foundation argument but appears last in Part 2. All preceding WINs 2.1-2.8 are stronger with 2.9 context.

issues.title: HOL-HIERARCHY c2 HIER-PHASE2-03 (major): Part 2 Summary header placed mid-section with 3 more arguments after it
issues.description: "Summary: The Model Refutes Itself" header at char ~39,516 of 58,717-char section, but THREE substantive arguments follow. Readers may stop at the summary.

issues.title: HOL-HIERARCHY c2 HIER-PHASE2-04 (major): 20 Self-Contradicted WINs but Part 2 only features 9 named examples
issues.description: 20 WINs tagged SC in wins.json but Part 2 features only 9 named. Other 11 either undiscussed or scattered. Defender can claim review picked easy targets.

issues.title: HOL-HIERARCHY c2 HIER-PHASE2-05 (moderate): 3-tier signposting buried inside Part 1 model-description tab
issues.description: "How This Review Is Organized" sits inside Part 1. A reader on any other tab has no navigation context. Should be on Overview or cross-tab sticky.

issues.title: HOL-HIERARCHY c2 HIER-PHASE2-06 (moderate): Kill-Shot label collision — Part 5 is dome tests, not our kill-shots
issues.description: Part 5 named "Kill-Shot Binary Tests" refers to the dome's own binary tests rebutted, not our strongest arguments. Creates confusion for readers expecting our kill-shots upfront.

issues.title: HOL-HIERARCHY c2 HIER-PHASE2-07 (minor): Part 2 subsections 2.1-2.9 have no strength ranking visible
issues.description: Subsections presented with no indication of which is strongest. A defender exiting at 2.1 misses the stronger arguments.

issues.title: HOL-TONE c2 holes 4-8 batch (minor): adversarial phrasing in Part 2b/8 §8.9/WIN-067 and sparse kernel-of-truth
issues.description: Batch: (4) Part 2b "pretend" adversarial; (5) Part 8 §8.9 two-clause structure; (6) WIN-067 "deliberately understating" x2; (7-8) sparse kernel-of-truth charity across WINs and Overview.

issues.title: HOL-STRESSTEST c2 hole 1 (major): falsifiability module vulnerable to tautological-restatement critique
issues.description: ds-falsifiability-module on Overview tab: a defender can claim the falsifiability criteria are circular. Needs stronger pre-emptive acknowledgment.

issues.title: HOL-STRESSTEST c2 hole 2 (major): Overview hero thesis overstates — "None of the 70 predictions" is too absolute
issues.description: Overview hero: "None of the 70 predictions produces a dome-specific result that standard physics cannot already explain." Needs softening — edge cases exist.

issues.title: HOL-STRESSTEST c2 holes 3-5 batch (mod+minor): stance imprecision, denominator transparency, living-doc framing
issues.description: Batch: (3 mod) stance opener imprecision; (4 mod) 89.7% honest-accuracy denominator uses silent-failure imputation without disclosure; (5 minor) no living-document acknowledgment.

issues.title: HOL-TAXONOMY c2 hole 1 (major): SC cluster inflation parallels dome count-inflation pattern we criticize
issues.description: Self-Contradicted count of 20 WINs may include disputed SC evidence. Enlarging SC cluster risks the same count-inflation critique we level at the dome.

issues.title: HOL-TAXONOMY c2 hole 2 (major): WIN-068 eclipse magnetic ensemble may duplicate WIN-012
issues.description: WIN-068 is the only post-cleanup SME finding mentioning duplication. Its taxonomic isolation weakens the de-duplication argument.

issues.title: HOL-TAXONOMY c2 holes 3-8 batch (mod+minor): WIN-058 verdict, Not Demonstrated scope, b-suffix, legend ordering
issues.description: Batch: (3 mod) WIN-058 Misleading but non-discrimination leading; (4 mod) Not Demonstrated too narrow; (5 mod) b-suffix undocumented; (6 mod) SME sub-pattern not in legend; (7-8 minor) legend ordering and h1 block not wrapped.

issues.title: WIN-029 c5 hole 2 (minor): averaging-convention choice in detail_evidence not acknowledged (carry-over c4)
issues.description: detail_evidence uses H_eff ~3316 km linear radius without acknowledging the averaging-convention choice. Carry-over from c4 hole 4.

issues.title: part2b-ISS2216-verify c2 hole 2 (minor): CA_DOME=1 numeral reads unnaturally in prose
issues.description: When CA_DOME=1, prose reads "Only 1 of N reviewed WINs derives..." — would read more naturally as "Only one of N." Minor cosmetic.

issues.title: part2b-ISS2216-verify c2 hole 3 (minor): "72 minus 1 of 72 WINs" numeric clunk from TOTAL_WINS template
issues.description: "{{TOTAL_WINS}} minus {{CA_DOME}} of {{TOTAL_WINS}} WINs work backwards" renders as "72 minus 1 of 72 WINs work backwards" — clunky phrasing.

issues.title: part3-NPxy-EXP436 c1 holes 1-4 batch (minor): source unity overstatement, compressed refs, char-delta mismatch
issues.description: Batch: (1) opening sentence overstates source unity; (2) WIN-007 compressed ref accuracy; (3) WIN-022 no monitor.py entry claim; (4) net char delta +540 claimed but actual +2121.
